---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for BOSS
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the use case before the implementation. The shape
of a useful BOSS feature request leads with what an operator,
auditor, or executor needs the system to do, not the schema /
API change you have in mind. -->

## Where in the adaptation surface does this live?

<!-- BOSS is opinionated about *new work shipping as data*
versus *new work requiring core code*. Pick the closest match:

- New JobKind / step graph (a registry row, no code)
- New StepPlugin (JS bundle + registry row)
- New Class registry entry (taxonomy)
- New service (a brand-new noun in the domain)
- BOSS-core change (the framework itself needs the capability)

See docs/design/extending-boss.md if you're not sure. -->

## Sketched solution

<!-- A first-cut idea is fine; we'll iterate. Include any
specific API shapes, JobKind step graphs, or schema
additions you have in mind. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you try or think about? -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Links to related issues, design docs, or tenant-specific
context that would help prioritize this. -->
